Package org.solenopsis.soap.metadata

Class EntitlementProcessMilestoneItem

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.metadata.EntitlementProcessMilestoneItem
public class EntitlementProcessMilestoneItem extends Object

Java class for EntitlementProcessMilestoneItem complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="EntitlementProcessMilestoneItem">
   <complexContent>
     <restriction base="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}anyType">
       <sequence>
         <element name="businessHours" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="criteriaBooleanFilter" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="milestoneCriteriaFilterItems" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}FilterItem" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="milestoneCriteriaFormula" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="milestoneName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="minutesCustomClass" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="minutesToComplete" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="successActions" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}WorkflowActionReference" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="timeTriggers" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}EntitlementProcessMilestoneTimeTrigger" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="useCriteriaStartTime" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </restriction>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>

    • getMilestoneCriteriaFilterItems

      public List<FilterItem> getMilestoneCriteriaFilterItems()
      Gets the value of the milestoneCriteriaFilterItems property.

      This accessor method returns a reference to the live list, not a snapshot. Therefore, any modification you make to the returned list will be present inside the Jakarta XML Binding object. This is why there is not a set method for the milestoneCriteriaFilterItems property.

      For example, to add a new item, do as follows: 

       getMilestoneCriteriaFilterItems().add(newItem);

      Objects of the following type(s) are allowed in the list FilterItem

      Returns:
      The value of the milestoneCriteriaFilterItems property.

      public List<WorkflowActionReference> getSuccessActions()
      Gets the value of the successActions property.

      This accessor method returns a reference to the live list, not a snapshot. Therefore, any modification you make to the returned list will be present inside the Jakarta XML Binding object. This is why there is not a set method for the successActions property.

      For example, to add a new item, do as follows: 

       getSuccessActions().add(newItem);

      Objects of the following type(s) are allowed in the list WorkflowActionReference

      Returns:
      The value of the successActions property.

      public List<EntitlementProcessMilestoneTimeTrigger> getTimeTriggers()

      This accessor method returns a reference to the live list, not a snapshot. Therefore, any modification you make to the returned list will be present inside the Jakarta XML Binding object. This is why there is not a set method for the timeTriggers property.

      For example, to add a new item, do as follows: 

       getTimeTriggers().add(newItem);

      Objects of the following type(s) are allowed in the list EntitlementProcessMilestoneTimeTrigger

      Returns:
      The value of the timeTriggers property.
